dependencies.name: @fro-bot/gateway
dependencies.reason: Gateway GitHub App client (app-client.ts installAuth permissions pattern), config.ts secret readers (readSecret/readMultilineSecret + O_NOFOLLOW), and Hono build/serve split that the dashboard's Units 2/secrets/server must mirror for the deferred @fro.bot/runtime extraction seam.

dependencies.name: @fro-bot/runtime
dependencies.reason: Runtime shared logger (Logger interface + redactSensitiveFields + Result<T,E> shape) the dashboard's logger and app-client error returns must match.
